skills.name: Tech stack
keywords: Software testing: blackbox testing, testing script documentation
Experienced in Google Sheet, Figma and Canva

work.name: Shottr
highlights: Collaborating directly with the founder to identify and resolve more than 30 bugs, including 5 serious bugs.
Received positive feedback for my attention to detail and efficient bug-finding.
Processed over 300 user feedback entries in Google Sheets to identify key response patterns, contributing to the development of a user-centric roadmap for Shottr.

work.name: ROAD Education
work.summary: Building the road website from complete scratch
highlights: Developed and deployed ROAD's website on AWS: utilizing EC2, S3, load balancer, establish CI/CD pipeline with GitHub actions.
Managing domain acquisition and integrated additional AWS services to optimize performance, scalability and achieve 99,9% uptime.
Implemented specialized functionalities for each product on ROAD website, namely STEM

volunteer.summary: Lead organizer for the New York City branch of the People's Climate March, the largest climate march in history.
highlights: Awarded 'Climate Hero' award by Greenpeace for my efforts organizing the march.
Men of the year 2014 by Time magazine

projects.name: Quantum Computing
projects.summary: Quantum computing is the use of quantum-mechanical phenomena such as superposition and entanglement to perform computation. Computers that perform quantum computations are known as quantum computers.
